sentence: 诚实是一种普世价值观。
pinyin: Chéngshí shì yī zhǒng pǔshì jiàzhíguān.

sentence: 这部先导片吸引了很多观众的关注。
pinyin: Zhè bù xiāndǎo piàn xīyǐn le hěn duō guānzhòng de guānzhù.
english: This pilot episode attracted a lot of viewer attention.

sentence: 这篇论文在页面底部加了详细注脚。
pinyin: Zhè piān lùnwén zài yèmiàn dǐbù jiā le xiángxì zhùjiǎo.
english: This paper added detailed footnotes at the bottom of the page.

meaning: 1. to pixelate an image; 2. to key in captcha authentication codes
sentence: 编辑对视频中的车牌进行了打码。
pinyin: Biānjí duì shìpín zhōng de chēpái jìnxíng le dǎmǎ.
english: The editor pixelated the license plates in the video.

sentence: 警察和歹徒之间发生了激烈枪战。
pinyin: Jǐngchá hé dǎitú zhījiān fāshēng le jīliè qiāngzhàn.
english: An intense gun battle broke out between police and criminals.
